headline: Enphase Energy (ENPH) Stock Could Be 14.3% Overvalued After Barclays Upgrade
summary: Enphase Energy (ENPH) is back in focus after Barclays upgraded the stock, citing its emerging solid state transformer business for data centers and new IQ9S-3P Commercial Microinverter shipments in the U.S. See our latest analysis for Enphase Energy. The Barclays upgrade and new IQ9S-3P Commercial Microinverter shipments come after a mixed stretch for Enphase Energy, with the 30-day share price return down 16.14% but the year-to-date share price return still up 54.90% and the 1-year total...

headline: Enphase Energy (ENPH) Launches Its Most Powerful Microinverter And Adds Former NVIDIA Executive
summary: Enphase Energy (NasdaqGM:ENPH) has launched and begun shipments of its US-made IQ9S-3P Commercial Microinverter, built with gallium nitride technology for high-wattage commercial solar panels and grid integration. The company is also presenting next-generation solar, storage, and energy management products for customers in Europe. Enphase has added Shanker Trivedi, a former NVIDIA executive with AI and data center experience, to its board of directors. Enphase Energy operates at the...
